content: Self-Refine’s task-focused iterative output polishing and Reflexion’s dynamic memory-enabled agentic self-reflection can be combined into a two-tier self-improvement framework for autonomous agents: Self-Refine handles local, task-specific refinement of individual outputs, while Reflexion accumulates cross-task reflective insights to update the agent’s global self-feedback heuristics. This combination eliminates the need for external supervision at both the single-task and long-term agent development levels.
